nasb.text: Saul and Jonathan, beloved and pleasant in their life, And in their death they were not parted; They were swifter than eagles, They were stronger than lions.

esv.text: “Saul and Jonathan, beloved and lovely! In life and in death they were not divided; they were swifter than eagles; they were stronger than lions.

cnv.text: 掃羅和約拿單， 生時相親相愛， 死時也不分離。 他們比鷹還快速， 比獅子更勇猛。

ccb.text: “扫罗和约拿单深受爱戴， 生死不分离。 他们比鹰更敏捷， 比狮子还强壮。
